flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Texas A&M University-Texarkana rose 118% between 2021 and 2024 ($20.7k → $45.1k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Texas A&M University-Texarkana rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($16.0k → $19.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Texas A&M University-Texarkana fell 14% between 2021 and 2024 (19.2% → 16.5%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Texas A&M University-Texarkana rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 (50.4% → 63.7%).
